overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Fallout 4 showing a player walking along a post-apocalyptic Boston waterfront promenade. The player encounters a Mirelurk crab creature near a traffic light, then continues along the water's edge to view an abandoned yacht and the distant ruined skyline featuring the Mass Fusion tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-apocalyptic waterfront promenade with traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked pavement toward a large mirelurk crab near the traffic light

notable_agents.action: large green mirelurk crab standing near the traffic light, facing the player

entered.detail: rusted traffic signal mounted on a tall green pole
leafless dead tree with twisted branches
destroyed Boston cityscape with crumbling skyscrapers
stone balustrade separating the walkway from the water
rusted blue vehicle wreck partially covered in vines

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a cracked asphalt promenade on a clear autumn day. A large mirelurk crab stands near a rusted traffic light ahead, while the ruined Boston skyline looms in the hazy distance across the water.

events.description: player veers slightly right to pass around the mirelurk crab

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking past the mirelurk crab, giving it a wide berth on the right side

notable_agents.action: mirelurk crab scuttling across the path from left to right
abandoned yellow bus visible in the distance among the ruins

entered.detail: large abandoned yacht floating in the harbor

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and passes the large mirelurk crab, which scuttles across the path. The traffic light and abandoned car fall behind as an abandoned yacht becomes visible in the harbor, and the stone railing moves closer to the player's left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with harbor view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path looking out at the harbor and distant boat

entered.detail: tall green lamppost with ornate base along the path

segments.scene_description: With the mirelurk gone, the player continues along the cracked concrete promenade. The abandoned yacht grows larger in the center of view as the stone railing slides to the left, and a green lamppost appears along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: water's edge overlooking harbor and Mass Fusion tower

events.description: camera slows and turns left to face the water directly, approaching the stone railing

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone railing to look out at the abandoned boat and distant Mass Fusion tower

entered.detail: distinctive tall red tower with spherical containment structures and glowing elements

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the water's edge, the stone railing now close on the left. The abandoned yacht dominates the center view while the distinctive Mass Fusion tower rises prominently in the distant skyline. The bare trees from the starting area have fallen behind as the camera focuses on the harbor vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a cracked waterfront promenade that shifts from a tense encounter with a creature to a wide vista of a ruined city. It begins with a walk across asphalt on a clear autumn day, moving toward a large mirelurk crab standing by a rusted traffic light with the hazy Boston skyline in the distance. As the camera passes the scuttling creature, the traffic light and an abandoned car recede, giving way to the sight of an abandoned yacht in the harbor while a stone railing emerges on the left. The scene then opens further as the player continues along the concrete path past a green lamppost, causing the yacht to grow larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera reaches the water's edge, leaving the bare trees behind to focus on the harbor vista where the Mass Fusion tower rises prominently against the distant skyline.
